case_title: NORINE SMITH VS. STEVE ELVIS LOWE et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMITH, NORINE AS TO DEFENDANT LOWE, STEVE ELVIS SOLTANIAN, BABAK SPECK CAB COMPANY AKA VETERAN'S CAB COMPANY DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-04-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-30-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-20-2003
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR FEB-18-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
RESPONSE TO OSC RE: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMITH, NORINE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON FEB-18-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-27-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-04-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT COMPLT & ENTIRE ACTION
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-27-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
